headline: Meta Platforms announced the release of its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: This filing signals the release of Meta's Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, which will be critical for assessing the company's ad revenue growth, AI investments, and Reality Labs profitability. Investors should closely monitor the accompanying earnings call and non-GAAP reconciliations for insights into operational efficiency and forward guidance.
